title: Tensura Movie 2: Tears of the Azure Sea Tickets Go on Sale in Spain
content: Crunchyroll and Sony Pictures Entertainment are bringing That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime the Movie: Tears of the Azure Sea to Spainish theaters on April 30. The movie will be available in both Spanish dubbed and subtitle versions, with tickets already on sale .
author: Anime Corner

title: Skeleton Knight in Another World Season 2 Reveals New Visual and Trailer Featuring ED by DIALOGUE+
content: Skeleton Knight in Another World Season 2 anime revealed a new visual and trailer featuring the ED song ahead of its July premiere. The anime previously confirmed that Aura Studio would be replacing Studio KAI and HORNETS for the animation production, with Katsumi Ono is returning as director.
author: Anime Corner

title: Star Wars, The Hobbit, And One Piece Lead This Week’s Biggest Collectible Auctions
content: Auctions are great places to find the items you are missing for your favorite collection, whether that collection is based on comics, collectibles, trading cards , film, animation, and more.
author: ComicBook

title: Beloved Fantasy Creator Unveils New Look At Fan-Favorite Characters Ahead of Season 2
content: Kusanagi Mizuho’s beloved shojo manga, Yona of the Dawn , reached its conclusion on December 19th, 2025, after a 16-year-long journey. The historical fantasy manga debuted in 2009 as a monthly series, earning praise for its gorgeous art, unique storytelling, and lovable characters.
author: ComicBook

title: Solo Leveling’s New Release Prepares For The Best Arc Ahead of Anime Sequel
content: Thanks to the web novel by Chugong and the manhwa adaptation, Solo Leveling became a global phenomenon, popularizing both media among international fans. With such a massive fan following, the success of the anime was more or less guaranteed, but even then, it exceeded expectations by breaking all streaming records on…
author: ComicBook

title: Chainsaw Man Final Volume Hinted to Expand the Ending
content: Despite the Chainsaw Man manga coming to an end last month, there is still good news for the fandom. It began with the recent announcement that Chainsaw Man ’s latest movie, the Reze Arc, will finally arrive on Crunchyroll starting April 30th.
author: ComicBook

title: One of Netflix’s Earliest Anime Originals is Planning Something Big
content: While Netflix currently houses some of the biggest anime series worldwide, not every anime adaptation has been received with open arms. This year, the streaming service has seen plenty of anime controversy thanks to the release schedule of JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure: Steelball Run , as the series bypassed a weekly…
author: ComicBook

title: Crunchyroll Keeps Quiet on 2025’s Biggest Anime Movie Release Despite Bringing the Best One Home
content: Despite other streaming services pushing anime as a core part of their libraries, Crunchyroll remains the best platform by a wide margin. Holding onto its reputation as the top streaming service, it has also brought in the best anime movie of 2025.
author: ComicBook

title: Crunchyroll’s Darkest Spring 2026 Anime Reveals Its True Story (And It’s the Perfect Dark Fantasy of the Year So Far)
content: There are many anime currently airing in Spring 2026 on Crunchyroll ; however, not every series is emerging as a dark story. Among them, one particularly dark series has stood out as the perfect dark power fantasy with its latest episode, setting the course for an exciting narrative.
author: ComicBook
